senses.definition: the art, science, or activity of exploring how to prepare and eat good food

examples.x: With its diverse culture, India offers a rich tapestry of gastronomy from various regions.
Culinary schools not only teach cooking techniques but also delve deep into the world of gastronomy.
His passion for gastronomy led him to study culinary arts at a prestigious institute.
The city is renowned for its gastronomy, offering a wide range of gourmet restaurants.

senses.definition: a small restaurant that is not expensive

examples.x: We enjoyed a cozy dinner at a charming bistro downtown.
The bistro specializes in French cuisine, offering classic dishes like coq au vin and crème brûlée.
The local bistro is known for its warm atmosphere and friendly service.
They decided to meet for lunch at a nearby bistro to catch up over salads and sandwiches.
The bistro's outdoor patio is a popular spot for enjoying brunch on weekends.

senses.definition: a store where chocolate, sweets, etc. are sold

examples.x: The new confectionery in town sells a wide variety of handmade chocolates and candies.
She bought a box of assorted truffles from the confectionery as a gift for her friend.
The confectionery was decorated with colorful displays of candies and sugary treats.
During the holidays, the confectionery offers special seasonal treats like gingerbread cookies and peppermint bark.
The confectionery's storefront window showcased beautifully crafted chocolate sculptures for Valentine's Day.

senses.definition: a small restaurant

examples.x: We stopped at a roadside diner for breakfast on our road trip.
The diner's menu featured classic American comfort food like burgers and milkshakes.
The local diner is a favorite gathering spot for the community, especially on weekends.
They ordered a slice of homemade pie from the diner's dessert menu.
The diner's retro decor and jukebox create a nostalgic atmosphere for diners.

senses.definition: a service where one can shop or do business without leaving one's vehicle, such as fast-food restaurants, pharmacies, etc.

examples.x: We grabbed coffee from the drive-through on our way to work.
The fast-food restaurant's drive-through was packed with cars during lunchtime.
They love the convenience of the pharmacy's drive-through for picking up prescriptions.
Due to the pandemic, many restaurants expanded their drive-through services to accommodate more customers.
The drive-through at the bank allows customers to handle transactions without leaving their cars.

senses.definition: an area in a public place such as a shopping mall, etc. where multiple small restaurants are located

examples.x: We decided to meet at the food court for lunch since it offered a variety of options.
The food court in the mall was crowded with shoppers taking a break to eat.
Each vendor in the food court had something unique, from sushi to pizza to falafel.
They spent the afternoon sampling different cuisines from the stalls in the food court.
The new food court features several popular chain restaurants as well as local favorites.

senses.definition: a substance high in fat and found in blood and most body tissues, a high amount of which correlates with an increased risk of heart disease

examples.x: The doctor advised him to reduce his intake of saturated fats to lower his cholesterol levels.
Foods high in cholesterol, such as eggs and red meat, should be consumed in moderation.
Regular exercise and a healthy diet can help maintain healthy cholesterol levels.
She takes medication to manage her cholesterol and prevent heart disease.

senses.definition: (of food) containing or cooked in a lot of oil
(of food) containing a lot of oil

examples.x: The fish was overly oily, making the dish feel heavy and rich.
She dabbed her slice of pizza with a napkin to remove some of the oily residue.
The stir-fried vegetables were a bit oily but still flavorful and crisp.
The oily texture of the pasta sauce made it less appealing to those watching their fat intake.

senses.definition: pleasing or agreeable to the sense of taste

examples.x: The savory aroma of the roasted chicken filled the kitchen, making everyone's mouth water.
She enjoyed the savory flavors of the herb-crusted lamb, perfectly seasoned to delight her taste buds.
The savory stew, rich with vegetables and tender beef, was the perfect comfort food for a cold evening.
The chef prepared a savory sauce to accompany the grilled vegetables, enhancing their natural flavors.

senses.definition: (of food, particularly cake and bread) not fresh anymore, due to exposure to air or prolonged storage

examples.x: The bread became stale after sitting out on the counter for several days.
She found the crackers in the pantry had gone stale, lacking their usual crispness.
The cookies tasted stale, indicating they had been left uncovered for too long.
The pastry had gone stale in the display case, losing its flakiness and becoming dry.
The chips were stale and unappealing, having been left exposed to air for too long.

senses.definition: lacking flavor or an interesting taste

examples.x: The tasteless crackers were disappointing, lacking any discernible flavor.
The tasteless tofu dish failed to impress even the most adventurous eaters at the party.
He found the tasteless protein shake to be difficult to drink without gagging.
The tasteless rice lacked seasoning and left her craving something more flavorful.
She regretted ordering the tasteless sandwich from the deli, wishing she had chosen something else.

senses.definition: (of food) easy to chew or cut

examples.x: The steak was so tender that it practically melted in my mouth.
The braised lamb shanks were incredibly tender, falling off the bone with ease.
They marinated the pork overnight to make it extra tender and flavorful.
The vegetables in the stew were cooked to perfection, tender but not mushy.

senses.definition: tasting very good

examples.x: He cooked a yummy pasta dish with a savory tomato sauce.
The yummy chocolate cake melted in her mouth, leaving her craving for more.
The ice cream shop offered a variety of yummy flavors to choose from.
Their grandma's homemade apple pie was always a yummy treat.
They enjoyed a yummy brunch with fluffy pancakes and crispy bacon.

senses.definition: (of a restaurant, store, etc.) providing customers with the chance to serve themselves and then pay for it

examples.x: The cafeteria offers a self-service salad bar where customers can create their own meals.
We enjoyed the convenience of the self-service kiosks at the airport for quick check-ins.
The new self-service gas station allows drivers to fill up their tanks without waiting for an attendant.
The library installed self-service checkout machines to streamline the borrowing process.
At the self-service buffet, guests can choose from a wide variety of dishes at their own pace.

senses.definition: a small dish that is eaten before the main part of a meal

examples.x: We started our meal with a delicious appetizer of bruschetta topped with fresh tomatoes and basil.
The restaurant offered a complimentary appetizer of olives and breadsticks while we waited for our entrees.
She ordered a variety of appetizers, including shrimp cocktail and stuffed mushrooms, to share with the table.
The waiter recommended the cheese platter as an excellent appetizer to pair with our wine.
Before the main course, we enjoyed a light appetizer of vegetable spring rolls with a tangy dipping sauce.

senses.definition: the main segment of a meal

examples.x: For my entree, I chose the grilled salmon with a side of asparagus and roasted potatoes.
The restaurant's menu featured a variety of entrees, including steak, chicken, and vegetarian options.
He always saves room for dessert, no matter how filling the entree is.

senses.definition: a type of food or drink or other product that a place is known for because it is delivered in high quality

examples.x: The Italian restaurant's specialty is homemade pasta, made fresh daily by skilled chefs.
The bakery is famous for its specialty cakes, intricately decorated for weddings and birthdays.
They proudly serve their specialty coffee, sourced from small farms in South America.
The local brewery's specialty beer, a stout aged in bourbon barrels, has won several awards.
The spa's specialty treatment, a deep-tissue massage with aromatherapy, promotes relaxation and healing.

senses.definition: a menu in which each dish has a separate price
someone who enjoys and knows about food and wine very much

examples.x: She is a true gourmet who enjoys exploring new flavors and cuisines.
The event attracted gourmets from around the world, eager to taste the finest dishes.
He became a gourmet after studying culinary arts and working in top restaurants.
The gourmet's palate is refined, appreciating the nuances of flavors and textures in every dish.
As a gourmet, he enjoys pairing wines with gourmet cheeses to enhance the dining experience.

senses.definition: a person who buys something from a place or visits it very often

examples.x: The bartender greeted the regulars by name as they entered the pub.
The bookstore's regulars eagerly awaited the latest novel by their favorite author.

senses.definition: a dish of a tortilla wrapped around a mixture of ground meat or beans, originated in Mexico

examples.x: She ordered a chicken burrito with extra guacamole and salsa for lunch.
The burrito, filled with black beans and cheese, was a satisfying vegetarian option.
He prefers his burrito spicy, so he asked for extra jalapeños.

senses.definition: the preserved eggs of some fish, especially one called sturgeon, eaten as food, which is considered a very expensive dish

examples.x: He was amazed by the high price tag on the caviar, realizing it was a luxury out of his reach.
She asked friends and family for recommendations on where to find affordable caviar.
They visited a seafood market and purchased a small tin of caviar.

senses.definition: a thin slice of meat that is coated with breadcrumbs and then fried

examples.x: She ordered a chicken schnitzel with a side of potato salad at the German restaurant.
The schnitzel was served hot and crispy, topped with lemon wedges for extra flavor.
He enjoys making schnitzel at home, using a family recipe passed down through generations.

senses.definition: a dish that consists of a pancake that is filled with vegetables and sometimes meat and then fried until crispy, originated in China

examples.x: They ordered vegetable spring rolls as an appetizer before their main meal.
The spring rolls were served with a sweet and sour dipping sauce.
She learned how to make homemade spring rolls from her grandmother's recipe.
The restaurant offers a variety of spring rolls, including shrimp and pork options.
He enjoys the crispy texture of fried spring rolls, especially when paired with spicy peanut sauce.

senses.definition: a dish of small rolls or balls of cold cooked rice flavored with vinegar and garnished with raw fish or vegetables, originated in Japan

examples.x: She enjoys sushi, especially the salmon and avocado rolls.
The sushi chef skillfully prepared a variety of nigiri and sashimi.
They ordered a platter of sushi to share, including California rolls and spicy tuna rolls.
The sushi restaurant imports fresh fish from Japan to ensure the highest quality.
He learned how to make sushi at a cooking class and now enjoys making it at home for friends and family.

senses.definition: a dish that consists of a folded tortilla filled with ground meat, beans, etc., originated in Mexico

examples.x: They had tacos for dinner, filled with seasoned ground beef, lettuce, and salsa.
The taco truck on the corner serves authentic Mexican tacos with homemade corn tortillas.
She prefers fish tacos with a squeeze of lime and a drizzle of creamy chipotle sauce.
The taco festival featured a variety of tacos, from traditional to gourmet creations.
He ordered a trio of street-style tacos, each topped with cilantro and diced onions.

senses.definition: a type of dark-red wine with a sweet taste, originated in Portugal

examples.x: The sommelier recommended pairing the dessert with a glass of vintage port.
They enjoyed a bottle of aged port with cheese and crackers after dinner.
The port, with its rich flavors of plum and chocolate, complemented the decadent chocolate cake perfectly.
She bought a bottle of port as a gift for her wine-loving friend.
During the holidays, they toast with glasses of port by the fireplace.

senses.definition: to treat someone to meals and drinks, typically in a luxurious or extravagant manner

examples.x: The couple enjoyed a romantic evening when he decided to wine and dine her at an upscale restaurant.
Business partners often wine and dine prospective clients to build stronger relationships.
To celebrate their anniversary, they decided to wine and dine at a five-star hotel.
He loves to wine and dine his guests, showcasing his culinary skills.
While negotiating the deal, they were wining and dining the international partners.

senses.definition: a type of beer that is dark in color and does not contain bubbles

examples.x: He ordered a pint of ale, preferring its rich and malty flavor over lager.
The brewery specializes in crafting traditional English ales using locally sourced ingredients.
They sampled a variety of ales at the beer festival, from pale ales to stouts.
She enjoys brewing her own ale at home, experimenting with different hops and yeast strains.
The pub's ale selection rotates seasonally, offering customers new flavors to try throughout the year.

senses.definition: a drink made with pineapple, coconut, and rum
a drink served with a lot of small pieces of ice

examples.x: She ordered a chocolate frappe to enjoy as a refreshing treat on a hot day.
The café's menu includes a range of fruit-flavored frappes, perfect for summer.
He prefers his frappe blended until smooth with just a hint of sweetness.
The barista topped the caramel frappe with whipped cream and caramel drizzle.
They offer a decaf option for those who enjoy frappes without the caffeine buzz.

senses.definition: a type of light beer, flavored with hops

examples.x: He ordered a cold pilsner to accompany his meal at the brewery.
The bartender recommended pairing the seafood with a crisp, refreshing pilsner.
They brewed their own pilsner using traditional Czech methods for a clean and balanced taste.
The pub's selection of pilsners includes both domestic and imported varieties.
She enjoys the light and hoppy flavor profile of a well-crafted pilsner on a warm summer day.
